seoTitle: Mount Kuring-Gai vs Mount Lewis — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Kuring-Gai and Mount Lewis. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Kuring-Gai vs Mount Lewis: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Kuring-Gai and Mount Lewis.
heading: Mount Kuring-Gai vs Mount Lewis — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Kuring-Gai, New South Wales and Mount Lewis, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Kuring-Gai has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Mount Lewis (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Kuring-Gai or Mount Lewis safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Kuring-Gai has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Mount Lewis scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Kuring-Gai scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Lewis scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Kuring-Gai or Mount Lewis?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Kuring-Gai has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
